import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';

export async function GET() {
  const llmsContent = `# bPurple Technology LTD

> Technology Servicing, Cloud Solutions, Data Resilience (Veeam Partner), Training & Consulting.

## Company Overview
- [Home](https://bpurplehq.org/) — Main company website
- [Solutions](https://bpurplehq.org/solutions) — Cloud, Data Storage, Veeam, Training & Consulting

## Blog & Insights
Our blog features in-depth articles on cloud computing, data backup & recovery, Veeam best practices, cybersecurity, AI, workforce training, and technology trends.

- [Blog Home](https://bpurplehq.org/blog)
- [All Blog Posts](https://bpurplehq.org/blog)

**Recent / Important Topics:**
- Cloud migration strategies
- Data resilience and ransomware protection with Veeam
- Technology training and workforce development
- Custom software development best practices

## Contact & Services
- [Contact Us](https://bpurplehq.org/contact)
- [Book a Consultation](https://bpurplehq.org/contact)

---

Last updated: ${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}
`;

  return new Response(llmsContent, {
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
    },
  });
}
